rationale: Educ. Code §11.060 governs vacancies on school district boards of trustees. It is wholly unrelated to the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: If a vacancy occurs on the board of trustees of an independent school district, the remaining trustees may fill the vacancy by appointment until the next trustee election.
_note: Rule text concerns board vacancies; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
